title: saxifraga arundana var. carpetana
intro: Saxifraga arundana var. carpetana, also known as Saxifrage, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant with small white flowers that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Saxifrage include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Saxifrage can be prepared as a herbal infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds with a solvent, such as ethanol.
